title: Jennifer Lawrence's New Film 'Ember' Set to Redefine Hollywood — First Look Photos
excerpt: Oscar winner Jennifer Lawrence is back with what insiders are calling her most powerful performance yet in 'Ember', a climate thriller that blends blockbuster spectacle with devastating emotional depth.
content:
Oscar winner Jennifer Lawrence has returned to the Hollywood spotlight with what industry insiders are already calling her defining role. First-look photos from her upcoming climate thriller Ember dropped overnight, and the internet cannot stop talking about them.

In the images, Lawrence appears virtually unrecognizable — fierce, weathered, and commanding — as Dr. Maya Cross, a rogue climate scientist who discovers that a catastrophic global weather event is just 72 hours away, and that powerful forces within the government are determined to keep it secret.

The Film

Ember is directed by Denis Villeneuve (Dune, Arrival, Blade Runner 2049) and produced by Warner Bros. Pictures with a budget reported to be north of $175 million. It marks Villeneuve's return to a more grounded, human-scale thriller after the cosmic grandeur of the Dune saga.

"Denis is a master of making you feel the enormity of something through the smallest human detail," Lawrence told EW in an exclusive interview. "Every scene in Ember, even the quiet ones, feels like you're standing on the edge of something terrifying. I've never worked like this before."

What Critics Who Saw Early Screenings Are Saying

Warner Bros. held a private screening for select press and studio executives last week, and the buzz emerging from that event is nothing short of extraordinary. One attendee, who asked not to be named, told StarScoop Daily: "Jennifer Lawrence gives a performance that I genuinely believe will win her a second Oscar. And the film itself is a masterpiece. Villeneuve has made his best film."

Oscar prediction sites have already placed Ember as the frontrunner for Best Picture and Best Actress at the 2027 Academy Awards — and the film doesn't release until September.

Release & Awards Strategy

Ember will have a limited release on September 5, 2026, ahead of a wide global rollout on September 19. Warner Bros. is positioning it aggressively for the awards season, submitting it in all major categories. The first full trailer is expected to drop this Friday.
imageAlt: Jennifer Lawrence's New Film 'Ember' Set to Redefine Hollywood — First Look Photos
author: StarScoop Daily Staff
metaDescription: Jennifer Lawrence stuns in first-look photos from Denis Villeneuve's 'Ember' — already the Oscar frontrunner for 2027. Full details and reaction.
